failureReasons: The diff does not implement the banner output, aggregate exclusion logic, denominator display, or badge updates required by the plan — only struct fields and an uncalled helper function were added.
The partitionByLanguage function uses analysis.ForLanguage() instead of the plan-specified Unsupported==true field, diverging from the approved approach.
The FormatCardMarkdown function body shows no changes in the diff, meaning the report card output was not modified at all.
23 implementation rounds produced an incomplete change that would not satisfy the plan requirements.

dimensions.evidence: Diff only adds Card struct fields and a partitionByLanguage helper; the banner output, aggregate exclusions, denominator display, and badge updates required by the plan are not visibly implemented. The FormatCardMarkdown body shows zero changes in the diff hunk.
Only 1 file changed (card.go vs plan's report.go) but plan allowed 'whichever file'; additions are focused on the task domain with no unrelated churn.
No test modifications visible in the diff, but the implementation is so incomplete that a green test suite strongly suggests the new code paths are untested or unreachable.

Dead code risk: new struct fields and partitionByLanguage are never called; detection uses analysis.ForLanguage() instead of plan-specified Unsupported==true, diverging from the intended mechanism; incomplete implementation would mislead an operator reviewing the PR.
